response.justification: Szabo exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with 20 years of diverse technical work and holds a relevant BS in Computer Science. His current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator work, demonstrating hands-on exposure to cutting-edge AI technologies. However, the role seeks a director-level strategic leader with deep, demonstrated AI/ML expertise and proven ability to advise major customers on cloud and AI adoption—areas where his resume shows limited evidence. His entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is valuable but exists in a niche open-source domain rather than demonstrating scalable AI product leadership. While his technical foundation is solid, his career trajectory suggests a skilled senior engineer rather than the strategic, director-level innovator this principal role requires.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year requirement with 20 years of progressive software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, demonstrating hands-on familiarity with modern AI frameworks and agentic workflows
Proven entrepreneurial experience as founder of GISCollective, showing sustained ability to build and maintain complex technical platforms
concerns: AI expertise appears nascent (1+ year at re:cinq); no demonstrated track record building or shipping AI products at scale or advising strategic customers on AI adoption
Resume reflects individual contributor and technical leadership focus rather than strategic, director-level thinking required for this principal role
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; lacks formal advanced training in machine learning or AI domains preferred for this position

key_factors.factor: Demonstrated AI/ML product expertise and customer advisory
Recent hands-on AI infrastructure experience at re:cinq
